steps.name: Setup wizard agent with 6-phase orchestration workflow
steps.description: Markdown agent implementing PREREQUISITES, COMPANY PROFILE, CORPUS SETUP, API KEY, VALIDATION SUMMARY, and NEXT STEPS phases. Delegates profile creation to sbir-profile-builder via Task tool. Enforces sequential gates with idempotent re-run support.
criteria: Agent file at agents/sbir-setup-wizard.md follows plugin convention (YAML frontmatter, 200-400 lines)
Agent checks Python 3.12+, Git, Claude Code with [ok]/[!!] indicators
Agent detects existing profile via JsonProfileAdapter and offers keep/update/fresh options
Agent delegates profile creation to sbir-profile-builder via Task tool
Agent accepts comma-separated corpus directories with path validation
Agent checks GEMINI_API_KEY with skip/configure options
Phase 5 re-verifies all items (does not trust cached results)
Phase 6 displays concrete next-step commands

steps.name: Setup domain skill with check commands and display patterns
steps.description: Domain knowledge skill covering: prerequisite check commands for Python/Git/Claude Code, validation status indicators ([ok]/[!!]/[--]), profile detection via JsonProfileAdapter, corpus detection, API key check, Gemini configuration instructions, next-step commands, and delegation patterns.
criteria: Skill file at skills/setup-wizard/setup-domain.md within 100-200 lines
Documents prerequisite check commands with platform-specific notes (Windows python vs python3)
Defines three validation indicators with usage rules
Includes profile detection Python one-liner using JsonProfileAdapter
Documents Gemini API key configuration instructions with shell-specific syntax
Documents delegation patterns for profile builder and corpus ingestion

steps.name: Setup command with agent dispatch
steps.description: Command file dispatching to sbir-setup-wizard. No arguments. Documents 6-step flow, prerequisites, and context files.
criteria: Command at commands/sbir-setup.md follows plugin convention (YAML frontmatter with description and argument-hint)
Dispatches to @sbir-setup-wizard agent
Documents all 6 flow steps
Lists context files (company profile, corpus, skill)

steps.name: README update to lead with setup command
steps.description: Update README.md to lead with /sbir:setup as the primary entry point. Document setup phases, command reference, idempotency, and multi-project workflow.
criteria: README leads with /sbir:setup as first command new users should run
Setup phases documented (prerequisites, profile, corpus, API key, validation)
Command reference table includes /sbir:setup in Pre phase
Idempotency and re-run behavior documented
